timewaver_frequency_software.description: Software for Individualized Microcurrent Frequency (IMF) application with Spinal Application, Automation, Information Level, Realtime, Resonance, Imbalances and Matrix modules and accessories. Requires TimeWaver Frequency Medical System.
Software for Frequency Specific Microcurrent (FSM) application according to Carolyn McMakin with over 120 time-tested protocols and accessories. Requires TimeWaver Frequency Medical System.
The popular TimeWaver Frequency and TimeWaver Frequency McMakin-Software in one package and accessories. Requires TimeWaver Frequency Medical System.

Complete BIZ 2.0 + Complete Holistic Coaching + more than 50 Sets + 12 Dimensions + 40 Focus texts + 20 Templates + more than 40 Templates EP module. Minus €1,400 discount for existing BIZ customers.

timewaver_pro_upgrades.description: More than 900,000 system databases entries from the well-established TimeWaver Pro system. Requires TimeWaver desk hardware.

More than 670,000 DB entries in 19 specially linked databases in the field of personal and success coaching. Including 19 analysis sets with specific focus text. Only to be operated with Pro Software.

Completely new TimeWaver software with extended functionalities and total revision of all modules, as well as comprehensive enhancements of operation and analysis logic. Must be purchased separately for each system desk hardware or Combi.
Completely new coaching databases (approx. 80,000), clear and very detailed descriptions of the entries, 19 Analysis Sets, 7 Dimension models, 4 Energy point models and 28 focus texts
Efficient analysis of harmonization lists, with automatic deactivation and optimized transmission time
The ChatGPT integration in TimeWaver offers a deeper understanding of analysis entries

timewaver_modules.description: Connects AI with the information field and extends the analysis with an adaptive, AI-controlled database selection
The main module of TimeWaver Pro for analyzing the balance of the organs in the Information Field (upgrade for users of the TimeWaver Basic systems)
Additional module for TimeWaver to apply frequencies through sound and add them to music
Module for TimeWaver to analyze and harmonize the aura and chakras and visual representation
Additional module for TimeWaver for Information Field analysis and for harmonizing resonance time points on the life time line
Module for TimeWaver to analyze and harmonize energy points on a two-dimensional surface (without meridian databases)
The module for the analysis of deeper conflicts from "Bio-Logical-Psycho-Social" contexts (prerequisite: TimeWaver Energy Points module)
TimeWaver module for analysis and harmonization of meridian points in the Information Field
Module based on the work of Peter Gariaev who discovered the Phantom DNA
Module for TimeWaver systemic constellation of family members, partners and groups of people in the Information Field
Data for more than 19,000 homeopathic single remedies and 50 mixtures, including digitally recorded oscillation patterns for the most important areas of life, created by Antonie Peppler
Expansion module for the Homeology module with the 44 most common "Life Topics", created from 25 years of practice with Creative Homeopathy, including 450 additional mixtures
To support individual coaching sessions, in combination with Information Field analysis. Only to be operated with Pro Software.
Approx. 230,000 new agricultural databases + 29 Templates for the energy points module. Runs only on TimeWaver Pro software and the Energy Points Module.

Analyse module for mobile frequency program and databases analysis, as well as harmonization in the Information Field. The application programs have been developed from the experience of more demanding applications by our users.
The compilation of these practice programs is based on the experiences of our TimeWaver users in their practical day-to-day work
The "Deep Cycle" programs are a variation and development of the unique "Gold Cycle" programs, developed by Jan Fredrik Poleszynski.
The informational patterns of the "Digital Schuessler Salts" can be applied just like "Digital Bach Flowers" or "Digital Homeopathy".
20 newly developed programs, based on the success at the 2016 Olympics, including four proven fitness programs for application before and after sports.
The programs to harmonize internal and external beauty
TimeWaver Home Beauty programs including intensive electrode with roller pin
Upgrade of early TimeWaver Home systems to firmware version 2.0 with completely revised data structure, up to 5 times faster transfer speed, 160 possible individual programs by user and much more.
The time-tested programs, a versatile ensemble for harmonizing the Bioenergetic Field. These programs contain a selection from 144,000 gold frequencies that are most valuable for your work.
The application and the vibration of the Bach Flower Essences with the TimeWaver Home System
The compilation of the programs for the individual information remedies and is based on a common compilation of homeopathic remedies.
